description:
This dashboard provides a comprehensive view of the performance and activity of your pfSense router. Designed with multiple VLANs in mind, it monitors key metrics like network traffic, interface status, CPU and memory usage, and firewall events. Each VLAN is tracked individually to provide insights into traffic patterns, device behavior, and bandwidth utilization.

Key Features:

Real-time and historical data visualization for all VLANs
Traffic analysis by VLAN and interface
Firewall logs and alerts
Resource usage (CPU, memory, disk)
WAN connection performance and latency monitoring
title: Network + Router Metrics
